segments.text: Two bottles, same shape, same job, but somehow they feel completely different.
One feels like a sci-fi weapon, other like a wellness ad. Quarant shows you what it fights while backup shows you
what you get. Same liquid, different emotions. We all want clean hands, but what are we really buying is how it
makes us feel. One bottle talks about germs, the other talks about you. That's the power of design. Same alcohol, same
result. The story that changes everything.
